# Implementation .github

This folder contains agent instructions for work under Implementation.

## Files

- instructions/global.instructions.md
  - Common rules for all Implementation tasks.
- instructions/spec-authoring.instructions.md
  - Rules for authoring and updating Spec files.
- instructions/devplan-authoring.instructions.md
  - Rules for authoring and updating DevPlan files.
- instructions/wave1-execution.instructions.md
  - Execution rules for Wave1 task-driven delivery.
- instructions/audit-closure.instructions.md
  - Audit, evidence, and readiness closure rules.
- instructions/consistency-check-protocol.instructions.md
  - Required consistency checks, pass criteria, and escalation rules.

## Goal

Keep Spec and DevPlan synchronized, traceable, and executable with minimal manual corrections.
